storyboard.content: I have a painful cold sore on my lower lip that started 4 days ago.
It started as a tingling feeling, then turned into a blister, and now it's crusting over.
The sore is 4 days in and appears to be crusting over, which is the normal healing stage for me.
It's mildly uncomfortable and embarrassing but it's not stopping me from doing anything.
I'm a 30-year-old man with no significant medical history. I get these cold sores every few months.
These outbreaks usually happen when I'm stressed or tired. Over-the-counter cream helps a little.
They always take about 10 days to fully heal, so this one seems to be on its normal course.
